ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.original-stat: Ta stran vam omogoča upravljanje naprav, vendar je videti, da še nimate nastavljenih nobenih naprav.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.areas.sensors: Za prikaz senzorjev temperature in vlažnosti v pregledu in v pogledu območja dodajte senzor na to območje in {edit_the_area} za konfiguracijo povezanih senzorjev.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.areas.empty_s: Temu območju še ni dodeljenih naprav. Dodelite naprave temu območju, da jih boste videli tukaj.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home.welcome_: Add lights, switches, sensors, or other smart home devices to get started.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.common_contro: Usage Prediction integration is not loaded.
Ta prostor se bo kmalu napolnil z entitetami, ki jih najpogosteje uporabljate, glede na vašo dejavnost.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home-other-de: There are no unassigned devices left. All devices are organized into areas.
ui.panel.lovelace.strategy.home-area.no_: Add your smart lights, switches, or sensors to this area to get started.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.confirm_delete: Ali ste prepričani, da želite izbrisati to kartico?
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.action_c: Ali ste prepričani, da želite izvesti akcijo " {action} "?
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_entit: Nobena entiteta ni na voljo za več informacij
Za preklop ni na voljo nobena entiteta
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.actions.no_actio: Določena ni nobena akcija za zagon
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.iframe.error_sec: Ni mogoče naložiti iframesov, ki kažejo na spletna mesta, ki uporabljajo {target_protocol} , če je ioBroker na voljo prek {context_protocol} .
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.recovery-mode.de: ioBroker je med nalaganjem vaše konfiguracije naletel na težave in zdaj deluje v načinu za obnovitev. Oglejte si dnevnik napak, da vidite, kaj je šlo narobe.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.no_data: Ni podatkov za prikaz. Lahko traja tudi do dve uri, preden se novi podatki pojavijo na nadzormi plošči.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.solar_con: This card indicates how much of the solar energy you produced was used by your home instead of being exported to the grid.
Če je ta vrednost tipično zelo nizka, to kaže na višek sončne energije. Razmislite o polnjenju baterij ali električnega avta v času, ko imate višek sončne energije.
Samoporabljene sončne energije ni bilo mogoče izračunati
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.self_suff: Ta kartica kaže, kako samozadosten je vaš dom.
Razmerja za samooskrbo ni bilo mogoče izračunati
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.grid_neut: This card indicates your grid energy usage.
If the needle is in the purple, you exported more energy to the grid than you imported from it. If it's in the blue, you imported more energy from the grid than you exported.
Nevtralnosti omrežja ni bilo mogoče izračunati
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.energy_di: Pojdite na nadzorno ploščo za energijo
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.energy.carbon_co: Na tej kartici je navedeno, koliko energije, porabljene v vašem domu, je bilo proizvedene z uporabo nefosilnih goriv, kot so sonce, veter in jedrska energija. Čim več, tem bolje!
Porabljene nizkoogljične energije ni bilo mogoče izračunati
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.dom: All entities must be from the same domain. Found: {domains}
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.dev: All entities must have the same device class. Found: {classes}
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.no_: No data to display. All entities are hidden or have zero values.
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.distribution.add: Add entities to display in the distribution chart
ui.panel.lovelace.cards.empty_state.no_d: Ta stran vam omogoča nadzor nad napravami, vendar je videti, da še niste nastavili nobenih naprav. Pojdite na stran za integracije, da začnete.
ui.panel.lovelace.unused_entities.title: Neuporabljene entitete
ui.panel.lovelace.unused_entities.availa: To so entitete, ki so vam na voljo, vendar še niso v uporabniškem vmesniku Lovelace.
ui.panel.lovelace.unused_entities.select: Izberite entitete, ki jih želite dodati na kartico, in nato kliknite gumb Dodaj kartico.
ui.panel.lovelace.add_entities.yaml_unsu: Te funkcije ne morete uporabljati, če uporabniški vmesnik Lovelace uporabljate v načinu YAML.
ui.panel.lovelace.add_entities.generated: To funkcijo lahko uporabite le, ko ste prevzeli nadzor nad uporabniškim vmesnikom Lovelace.
ui.panel.lovelace.add_entities.saving_fa: Shranjevanje konfiguracije uporabniškega vmesnika Lovelace ni uspelo.
ui.panel.lovelace.views.delete_named_vie: Pogled ''{name}''bo izbrisan skupaj z vsemi karticami.
ui.panel.lovelace.views.delete_unnamed_v: Ta pogled bo izbrisan skupaj z vsemi karticami.
ui.panel.lovelace.views.delete_named_vie: ''{name}'' view and all its sections will be deleted.
ui.panel.lovelace.views.delete_unnamed_v: Ta pogled in vsi njegovi razdelki bodo izbrisani.
ui.panel.lovelace.reload_resources.refre: Če želite dokončati ponovno nalaganje, morate osvežiti stran. Ali jo želite zdaj osvežiti?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.yaml_unsupporte: Uporabniški vmesnik za urejanje ni na voljo v načinu YAML.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.head: Urejanje konfiguracije
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.conf: Your dashboard will be reset to an empty state. You can start fresh and build your dashboard from scratch.
Imate neshranjene spremembe, ali ste prepričani, da želite zapreti?
Vaša konfiguracija lahko vsebuje komentarje, ki ne bodo shranjeni. Ali želite nadaljevati?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.reso: Virov ne bi smeli več dodajati v konfiguracijo Lovelace, lahko pa jih dodate na konfiguracijski plošči Lovelace.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.conf: Ta nadzorna plošča bo trajno izbrisana. Nadzorna plošča se bo samodejno obnovila in prikazala vaša območja, naprave in entitete.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.raw_editor.love: Vaša nadzorna plošča je bila posodobljena, ali želite posodobljeno konfiguracijo naložiti v urejevalnik in izgubiti trenutne spremembe?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_lovelace.e: Ta naslov je prikazan predvsem nad vašimi pogledi v uporabniškem vmesniku Lovelace.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.visib: Izberite, kateri uporabniki bi morali videti ta pogled v navigaciji
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.conve: It will create a new view using sections. This current view will stay untouched. All your cards will be imported so you can rearrange them freely.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.secti: You cannot change your section view to an other type. Start from scratch with a new view if you want to use another view type.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.dense: Poskusil bo zapolniti vrzeli z odseki, ki ustrezajo vrzeli. Zaradi tega je lahko postavitev odsekov manj predvidljiva.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.subvi: Podpogledi se ne prikažejo na zavihkih in imajo gumb za nazaj.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.path_: Ta vrednost bo postala del poti URL za odpiranje tega pogleda.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view.error: Pogleda ne morete shraniti z istim URL-jem kot drug obstoječi pogled.
URL vsebuje neveljavne/rezervirane znake. Za pot tega pogleda vnesite samo preprost niz.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view_heade:
# Pozdravljeni {user}
Tukaj dodajte svoje besedilo, spremenljivke predloge so podprte ✨
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_view_foote: Večji odseki bodo pomanjšani, da se bodo prilegali zaslonu. (npr. na mobilnih napravah)
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_badges.vie: Trenutna vrsta pogleda ne podpira značk.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_card.pick_: Katero kartico želite dodati na pregled {name}
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_card.confi: Ali ste prepričani, da želite preklicati?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_card.layou: Zavzemi celotno širino odseka, ne glede na njegovo velikost
Adjust the card height based on its content
Nastavi širino kartic z večjo natančnostjo
This card does not fully support resizing yet and may not display correctly with custom sizes.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_card.visib: Kartica bo prikazana, ko bodo izpolnjeni VSI spodnji pogoji. Če niso nastavljeni nobeni pogoji, bo kartica vedno prikazana.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_badge.head: Konfiguracija značke
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_badge.conf: Ali ste prepričani, da želite preklicati?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_badge.visi: Značka bo prikazana, ko bodo izpolnjeni VSI spodnji pogoji. Če niso nastavljeni nobeni pogoji, bo značka vedno prikazana.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.move_section.he: Izberite pogled, v katerega želite premakniti razdelek
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.move_section.er: Moving a section to a non-sections view is not supported.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.move_card.heade: Izberite pogled, na katerega želite premakniti kartico
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.move_card.strat: Premikanje kartice v samodejno ustvarjen pogled ni podprto.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.change_position: Na kateri položaj želite premakniti svojo kartico?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.select_view.no_: Na tej nadzorni plošči ni pogledov.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.select_dashboar: Nadzornih plošč ni bilo mogoče pridobiti. Poskusite znova.
Pogleda ni možno premakniti, ker je izbrana nadzorna plošča avtomatično ustvarjena.
Nalaganje konfiguracije za izbrano nadzorno ploščo ni uspelo.
Pogleda ni bilo mogoče premakniti na novo nadzorno ploščo, poskusite znova.
Pogleda ni bilo mogoče premakniti na novo nadzorno ploščo, vaše nadzorne plošče so v neznanem stanju. Ponovno naložite stran in preverite, ali je vse na svojem mestu.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.section.drop_ca: Drop card here to create a new section
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.section.importe: These cards are imported from another view. They will only be displayed in edit mode. Move them into sections to display them in your view.
Ta razdelek in vse njegove kartice bodo izbrisani.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_section.se: Večji odseki bodo pomanjšani, da se bodo prilegali zaslonu. (npr. na mobilnih napravah)
Display a colored background behind the section
Apply a specific theme to this section, overriding the view theme
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.edit_section.vi: Razdelek bo prikazan, ko bodo izpolnjeni VSI spodnji pogoji. Če niso nastavljeni nobeni pogoji, bo razdelek vedno prikazan.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.save_config.par: To nadzorno ploščo trenutno vzdržuje ioBroker. Samodejno se posodablja, ko so na voljo nove entitete ali komponente nadzorne plošče. Če prevzamete nadzor, se ta nadzorna plošča ne bo več samodejno posodabljala. V nastavitvah lahko vedno ustvarite novo nadzorno ploščo in se z njo poigrate.
Ali ste prepričani, da želite prevzeti nadzor nad vašim vmesnikom?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.save_config.yam: Za to nadzorno ploščo uporabljate način YAML, kar pomeni, da ne morete spremeniti konfiguracije Lovelace iz uporabniškega vmesnika. Če želite upravljati to nadzorno ploščo iz uporabniškega vmesnika, iz konfiguracije Lovelace v 'configuration.yaml' odstranite 'mode: yaml'.
Če želite prevzeti nadzor v načinu YAML, ustvarite datoteko YAML z imenom, ki ste ga določili v konfiguraciji za to nadzorno ploščo, ali privzeto 'ui-lovelace.yaml'.
Za začetek vam lahko pomaga trenutne nastavitve te nadzorne plošče:
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.migrate.para_no: Ta element nima ID-ja. Prosimo, dodajte ID tega elementa v 'ui-lovelace.yaml'.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.migrate.para_mi: ioBroker lahko samodejno doda ID na vse vaše kartice in poglede s pritiskom na gumb »Preseli konfiguracijo«.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.condition-edito: Not all visibility conditions are met
One or more conditions have an invalid configuration
Pogoja ni mogoče preizkusiti, ker konfiguracija ni veljavna.
Ta pogoj bo izpolnjen, če ima oseba uporabnika, ki si ogleduje to nadzorno ploščo, stanje, ki se ujema s katero koli od izbranih con.
Kartica bo prikazana, ko bodo izpolnjeni VSI spodnji pogoji.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.alarm-pane: This card allows you to arm and disarm your alarm control panel integrations.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.name: Območje
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.alert: In compact style, only the first one will be shown. Order alerts by priority.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.area.descr: This card automatically displays entities of a specific area.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.calendar.d: This card displays a calendar including day, week, and list views
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.conditiona: This card displays another card based on entity states.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entities.d: This card is the most common type of card. It groups items together into lists.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entities.e: Podrobnosti te vrstice si oglejte s klikom na gumb za urejanje
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entity.des: This card gives you a quick overview of your entity's state.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.empty_stat: This card displays a centered message with an optional icon and action buttons.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.button.des: This card allows you to add buttons to perform tasks.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.button.def: Privzeta vrednost je odvisna od zmožnosti entitete, preklopila se bo ali pa bo prikazano pogovorno okno z več informacijami.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.entity-fil: This card allows you to define a list of entities that you want to track only when in a certain state.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.gauge.name: Merilnik
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.gauge.desc: This card is a basic card that allows visually seeing sensor data.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.glance.des: This card is useful to group multiple sensors in a compact overview.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.name: Mreža
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.descr: This card allows you to show multiple cards in a grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.grid.title: Naslov
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.logbook.de: This card shows a list of events for entities.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.history-gr: This card allows you to display a graph for each of the entities listed.
Razširi meje Y osi, da se prilegajo podatkom
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dat: This card allows you to pick what data to show on linked statistics graphs and other energy cards.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dis: This card shows how the energy flowed between energy sources and the home.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-usa: This card shows the amount of energy your house has consumed, and from what source this energy came.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sol: This card shows the amount of energy your solar panels have produced.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-gas: This card shows the amount of gas consumed per source.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-wat: This card shows the amount of water consumed per source.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.power-sour: This card shows historical power data.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dev: This card shows the energy usage per device, it is sorted by usage.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sou: This card shows all your energy sources and the corresponding amount of energy for each.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-com: This card shows which date ranges are being compared. It is hidden if comparison is disabled.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-dev: Podroben graf o porabe energije naprave
Ta kartica prikazuje porabo energije po napravi skozi čas.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-san: Ta kartica prikazuje porazdelitev energije v vašem domu na Sankey grafu.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.power-sank: Ta kartica prikazuje pretok energije v vašem domu v realnem času.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.water-sank: This card shows the distribution of water consumption in your home on a Sankey graph.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.water-flow: Ta kartica prikazuje pretok vode v vašem domu v realnem času.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sol: This card shows how much of the solar energy was used by your home and was not exported to the grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-sel: This card shows how self-sufficient from the grid your home is.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-gri: This card shows the balance between imported and exported grid energy.
This card shows your energy dependency on the grid.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.energy-car: This card shows how much of the energy consumed by your home was generated using non-fossil fuels.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.statistics: This card allows you to display a graph of the statistics for each of the entities listed.
Razširi meje Y osi, da se prilegajo podatkom
This card allows you to display a statistical value of an entity of a certain period.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.horizontal: This card allows you to stack together multiple cards, so they always sit next to each other in the space of one column.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.distributi: This card displays multiple numerical entities as a proportional chart with an interactive legend.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.humidifier: This card gives control of a humidifier entity for humidifying or dehumidifying, allowing you to set its mode and desired humidity.
Prikaži trenutno vlažnost kot glavno informacijo
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.iframe.des: This card allows you to embed your favorite webpage right into ioBroker.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.iframe.hid: Uporabno za strani, ki dovoljujejo prozorno ozadje.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.light.name: Luči
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.light.desc: This card allows you to change the brightness of a light.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.generic.as: Bo prezrto, ker je bila velikost kartice spremenjena.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.generic.sh: Use the entity's picture if available; falls back to the configured image
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.generic.co: Optional key to connect a collection of energy cards to any matching date picker. Energy cards on this dashboard with no key will automatically be linked together.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.generic.ma: Need to add a community card or just want to manually write the YAML?
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.heading.de: This card structures your dashboard by providing title, icon and navigation.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.heading.en: Neaktivno stanje (npr. izklopljeno, zaprto) ne bo obarvano.
Visible if selected in state content
Entiteta bo prikazana, ko bodo izpolnjeni VSI spodnji pogoji. Če ni nastavljen noben pogoj, bo entiteta vedno prikazana.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.heading.bu: The button will be shown when ALL conditions below are fulfilled. If no conditions are set, the button will always be shown.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.shortcut.d: A card that triggers navigating to a page, opening a URL, or performing an action.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.map.name: Zemljevid
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.map.focus_: Include this entity when calculating the autofit
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.map.show_a: Automatically add all entities with coordinates
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.map.condit: Each selected entity will be shown when all conditions below are met. If no conditions are set, entities are always shown.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.map.descri: This card allows you to display entities on a map.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.markdown.a: Adding an action will disable links in the content.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.markdown.d: This card is used to render Markdown.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.clock.name: Ura
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.clock.desc: This card displays the current time using your desired size and format.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.clock.bord: Ali naj se okrog ure prikaže obroba
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.clock.tick: Whether to show ticks (indices) on the outside of the clock

Sekundni kazalec se premika v korakih po 1 sekundo
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.clock.face: Katera vrsta indeksov naj se uporabi za številčnico ure

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.media-cont: This card is used to display media player entities on an interface with easy to use controls.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.picture.de: This card allows you to set an image to use for navigation to various paths in your interface or to perform an action.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.picture.co: Vnesite ID media_source ali URL za sliko, ki jo želite prikazati.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.picture-el: This card is one of the most versatile types of cards. It allows you to position icons or text and even actions on an image based on coordinates.
Pot do slike za temni način
Click on the image preview to position this element
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.picture-en: This card displays an entity in the form of an image. Instead of images from URL, it can also show the picture of camera entities.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.picture-gl: This card allows you to set an image to use for navigation to various paths in your interface or to perform an action.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.plant-stat: This card is for all the lovely botanists out there.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.sensor.des: This card gives you a quick overview of a sensor's state with an optional graph to visualize change over time.
This card allows you to add, edit, check-off, and remove items from your to-do list.

Filter items to those which have a due date in the selected period.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.tile.featu: Vedno prikazano na dnu, če je postavitev vsebine navpična
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.vertical-s: This card allows you to group multiple cards so they always sit in the same column.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.card.weather-fo: This card displays the weather. Very useful to include on interfaces that people display on the wall.

ui.panel.lovelace.editor.entities.name: Entitete
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.badges.name: Badges
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.features.name: Značilnosti
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.features.no_com: Za to entiteto ni na voljo nobenih združljivih značilnosti
This feature uses the cover's favorite positions. To edit them, open the cover's more info dialog and press and hold a favorite.
This feature uses the cover's favorite tilt positions. To edit them, open the cover's more info dialog and press and hold a favorite.
This feature uses the light's favorite colors. To edit them, open the light's more info dialog and press and hold a favorite.
This feature uses the valve's favorite positions. To edit them, open the valve's more info dialog and press and hold a favorite.
Za to območje ni na voljo združljivih kontrolnikov.
V tej skupini ni entitet, razdelek ne bo prikazan
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.view.panel_mode: Ta pogled vsebuje več kartic, na plošči je lahko prikazana največ ena kartica.
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.cardpicker.cont: Pick an entity to see suggestions
ui.panel.lovelace.editor.cardpicker.not_: Can't find the card you want?
ui.panel.lovelace.warning.starting: ioBroker se zaganja. Vse morda še ni na voljo.
ui.panel.lovelace.externally_updated_toa: Dashboard updated in another session. Refreshing will discard your unsaved changes.
ui.panel.lovelace.changed_toast.message: Nastavitve uporabniškega vmesnika so bile posodobljene. Osvežim, da boste lahko videli spremembe?
